texto: Why doesn't anyone tell you we all wind up married to Henry the VIII?......My dear Anne Boleyn,...the only way a woman can avoid waking up next to Henry is to model herself after his daughter Elizabeth and sleep next to no one at all.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Judith Claire Mitchell que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “Why doesn't anyone tell you we all wind up married to Henry the VIII?......My dear Anne Boleyn,..…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, marriage, henry, com foco em casamento e reflexao.
